title: GenRole: Personalizing Role Play for Educators Supporting Autistic Students’ Social Interaction Learning
research_problem: Autism spectrum disorder (ASD) is a neurodevelopmental condition or neurotype that differs from the majority population in cognitive and sensory processing [4].
main_findings: neurotypical social conventions to shape social expressions in ways that align with their own traits and needs, fostering a stronger sense of agency.
